case_title: CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING VS C & C CHECK CASHING CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING AS TO DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED LETTER TO BETTY WILSON (CHECK CASHING) RETURNED FORWARDING TIME HAS EXPIRED.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-10-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF NOV-30-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHECK STOP CHECK CASHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT C & C CHECK CASHING CO. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEF. RETURNED TO SENDER.
